yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Dark_Web_Intercept_Telegram_RaaS_Syndica {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Threat Activity"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-12"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_UNC6426_Exploits_nx_npm_SupplyChain_Atta {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"

    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31888 - Shopware has user enumeration via distinct "; content:"CVE-2026-31888"; nocase; sid:5532055; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-3962 - Jcharis Machine-Learning-Web-Apps Jinja2 Tem"; content:"CVE-2026-3962"; nocase; sid:5539394; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31988 - yauzl 3.2.0 - Denial of Service via Off-by-"; content:"CVE-2026-31988"; nocase; sid:8194293; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
